description: 15 ground-truth facts for evaluating PlantMind query accuracy

facts.question: How many work orders have been raised for Pump P-104?
What is the root cause of recurring vibration in Pump P-104?
facts.answer: Coupling misalignment between the pump and its driver motor, compounded by bearing wear. Base frame may have shifted due to thermal expansion.

facts.question: How many seal failures has Compressor C-302 experienced?
What is the OISD-STD-154 requirement for emergency isolation valve response time?
facts.answer: Response time shall not exceed 5 seconds from signal to fully closed position (Clause 7.2.2)

facts.question: Does Valve V-045 comply with OISD-STD-154 Clause 7.2?
facts.answer: No. Inspection found actuator response time of 8 seconds, exceeding the 5-second maximum requirement.

facts.question: What equipment is involved in the emergency shutdown procedure for Unit-3?
Who is assigned to maintain Pump P-104?
What was the root cause of the Compressor C-302 incident?
facts.answer: Repeated mechanical seal failure caused by: (a) misalignment (0.15mm vs 0.05mm spec), (b) operating temperature exceeding design by 12°C (192°C actual vs 180°C rated), (c) seal material not rated for sustained high temps, (d) previous repair didn't address underlying misalignment.

facts.question: What regulations apply to maintenance work on Pump P-104?
facts.answer: OISD-STD-154 (Work Permit System) and Factory Act 1948, Section 21 (Fencing of Machinery)

facts.question: What is the recommended corrective action for the recurring vibration issue in P-104?
facts.answer: Laser alignment of pump-motor coupling, base frame leveling survey, increase vibration monitoring from quarterly to monthly, consider upgrading to flexible coupling.

facts.question: Are there any common failure patterns across different equipment in Unit-3?
facts.answer: Yes — misalignment is a recurring root cause affecting both P-104 (pump-motor coupling misalignment causing vibration/bearing failure) and C-302 (compressor-driver misalignment causing seal failure). This suggests a plant-wide alignment program may be needed.

facts.question: What is the ESD procedure when high discharge pressure is detected on C-302?
facts.answer: Compressor C-302 has auto-shutdown on high discharge pressure (Step 4 of SOP-SAFE-007). The ESD sequence also includes tripping feed pumps, closing V-045, and opening V-046 to flare.

facts.question: What Factory Act requirements apply to confined space entry?
facts.answer: Section 38: Space must be ventilated and gas-tested, person must wear breathing apparatus, a responsible person must be stationed outside with rescue equipment, and records must be maintained.

facts.question: Which work orders were raised as critical priority?
facts.answer: WO-2024-003 (C-302 seal leak) and WO-2024-006 (C-302 second seal failure)

facts.question: What cross-document insight connects V-045 inspection results to regulatory compliance?
facts.answer: The V-045 inspection report shows actuator response time of 8 seconds, which violates OISD-STD-154 Clause 7.2.2 (max 5 seconds). Per Clause 7.2.3, the failed valve must be repaired within 24 hours or the unit must be shut down. The SOP-SAFE-007 lists V-045 as an emergency isolation valve in the shutdown sequence.
